title: Thoughts and Things 3/3/24
html:
Two heavy beats. (1) dad yahir called: his oldest brother is dying in Mexico, dad is the only one able to fly out. Yahir feels guilty for partying through the news (echo of when David called about Vic dying). (2) First night of sex with sam solum — and the surfacing of erectile inconsistency, which she addressed with full transparency.

TL;DR

  • dad yahir's oldest brother dying — uncle in Mexico, dad flying out alone the next morning. Yahir registers distance from his father he wants to repair.
  • Pattern recognition: bad news after a great night out — same shape as the David/Vic call. Builds the party then tragedy motif.
  • sam solum sexual breakthrough + the erectile confidence question — she asked from genuine curiosity (you not into me, or like this with everyone?), he doesn't know which.
  • "Sam is intoxicating, she is mine and she knows it" — relational frame solidifies even without official status.

dad yahir · yahir family · sam solum · party then tragedy · erectile confidence · mexico family
